description: Tick to restrict the customer dropdown to inter-company entities and lock the price list.
label: Inter Company
name: Delivery Note-custom_is_inter_company

description: Pick a charge template to auto-populate the LCV checklist below.
label: LCV Charges Checklist
name: Purchase Receipt-custom_lcv_section

description: Manager override. When checked, the VAT duplicate check is skipped for this Customer.
label: Allow Duplicate VAT (Manager Override)
name: Customer-custom_allow_duplicate_vat

description: Required when VAT duplicate override is enabled. Explain which Customer shares the VAT and why.
label: Duplicate VAT Reason
name: Customer-custom_duplicate_vat_reason

description: When enabled, distribute charges by CBM ratio. Enter CBM per item in the table.
label: Distribute by CBM
name: Landed Cost Voucher-custom_distribute_by_cbm

description: Check this box to mark this request as urgent priority
label: Urgent Priority
name: Material Request-custom_is_urgent

description: Available at source warehouse
label: Source Avl
name: Material Request Item-custom_source_available_qty

description: Available at target warehouse
label: Target Avl
name: Material Request Item-custom_target_available_qty

description: Warehouse where damaged goods are transferred to
label: Damage Warehouse
name: Company-custom_damage_warehouse

description: Expense account for writing off damaged goods
label: Damage/Loss Account
name: Company-custom_damage_loss_account

description: Revenue control account credited by every NO VAT Sale.
label: NO VAT Naseef Account
name: Company-custom_novat_naseef_account

description: Expense account debited for COGS on every NO VAT Sale (posts via Stock Entry Material Issue).
label: NO VAT Damage Written Off Account
name: Company-custom_novat_cogs_account

description: Back-reference to the No VAT Sale that created this entry.
label: No VAT Sale
name: Journal Entry-custom_no_vat_sale

description: Back-reference to the No VAT Sale that created this entry.
label: No VAT Sale
name: Stock Entry-custom_no_vat_sale

description: Selling-price uplift applied when this Mode of Payment is used (e.g. 8.6957 for Tabby/Tamara to offset their 8% fee).
label: Surcharge Percentage
name: Mode of Payment-custom_surcharge_percentage

description: Proportion of this invoice funded through a BNPL Mode of Payment (Tabby/Tamara). Auto-calculated.
label: BNPL Portion Ratio
name: Sales Invoice-custom_bnpl_portion_ratio

description: Pre-uplift post-discount selling rate. Captured before BNPL surcharge is applied. Read-only.
label: Original Rate (Pre-Uplift)
name: Sales Invoice Item-custom_original_rate

description: Absolute SAR value of the BNPL surcharge applied to this line. Read-only.
label: BNPL Uplift Amount
name: Sales Invoice Item-custom_bnpl_uplift_amount

description: Asset / Bank account where the gross BNPL receivable is parked between invoice posting and provider settlement.
label: BNPL Clearing Account
name: Mode of Payment-custom_bnpl_clearing_account

description: Expense account used by BNPL Settlement to post the provider commission (e.g. Tabby's 8% fee).
label: BNPL Fee Expense Account
name: Company-custom_bnpl_fee_account

description: JSON snapshot of the payment-mode breakdown captured by the POS popup. Used by the BNPL uplift hook when is_pos=0 prevents the standard payments table from persisting.
label: POS Payments JSON
name: Sales Invoice-custom_pos_payments_json

description: Total BNPL surcharge embedded in this invoice's line rates (sum of per-line uplift). Read-only.
label: BNPL Surcharge Total
name: Sales Invoice-custom_bnpl_total_uplift

description: Inter-branch auto-injection only applies to Journal Entries dated on or after this date.
label: Inter-Branch Cut-Over Date
name: Company-custom_inter_branch_cut_over_date
